_description: Resume master source. `contact` + `shared_experience` + `certifications` are used across all versions; each entry in `versions` is an archetype (named variant of the resume) with version-specific summary, bullets, and skill emphases.

bullets: Drove roadmap for flagship fintech product, growing ARR from $2M to $15M over 18 months.
Shipped risk-scoring ML feature that reduced fraud losses by 34%.

fintech_generalist.title: Product Manager — Fintech
fintech_generalist.summary: Product leader with 6+ years in fintech; focus on risk, fraud, and consumer lending.
